title: BoP 1.20.1 | End Content
description: A Datapack for Forge 1.20.1 that reimplements Biomes o' Plenty's End biomes!
body:
# REQUIRES BIOMES O' PLENTY AND BLUEPRINT!!! THIS ONLY WORKS ON FORGE Biomes o' Plenty recently had an update for its 1.20.1 version, backporting everything from later versions of the mod, including the End Biomes & Blocks for them... though the generation was removed. This datapack simply restores the end biomes generating using Abnormals' Blueprint. There are small differences to the biomes themselves surface wise in comparison, but it's close enough to the original. The biggest difference is how frequent they spawn, if you aren't a fan then you can simply change them in ```\data\icycaeli\blueprint\modded_biome_slices``` and changing the ```weight``` bit. Terrablender 1.20.1 doesn't have support for End Biomes, hence why Abnormals' Blueprint is used. Overall, pretty self explanatory. Compatibility? This should work with any End Mod/Datapack right out the gate. ~~

sorry fabric users

~~
